description: Cross-vertical baseline — used when the customer's vertical isn't specified. Distributions are weighted-medians across the per-vertical baselines below.

citations.safe_score: Derived from blended posture scores across Verizon DBIR 2025 + IBM Cost of a Data Breach Report 2025.
citations.open_critical: NVD CVE distribution (2024-2025) + CISA KEV catalog active count per representative SMB fleet.
citations.mean_time_to_remediate_days: IBM Cost of a Data Breach Report 2025, MTTR by severity.
citations.mfa_coverage_pct: Microsoft Digital Defense Report 2025, identity attacks section.
citations.stale_account_pct: Microsoft Digital Defense Report 2025 + CyberArk Identity Security Threat Report 2025.
citations.patch_lag_days: Qualys TruRisk Research 2025, mean patch lag across customer base.
citations.nhi_growth_rate_pct: CyberArk Identity Security Threat Report 2025, NHI growth metric.
